cases.title: PreflightService read-only chain validates token Valid, session Active, enrollment without DB writes
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database is running
Active session row with class HESD-01 / subject SWE-101, room Phòng A201, and valid room GPS
Valid qr_tokens row with status Valid linked to sessionId
Enrolled studentId with Pending attendance_records row
PreflightService wired to QrTokenRepository, SessionRepository, and EnrollmentRepository
TestClock within attendance window (scheduledStart + 10 min)
beforeState: qr_token status Valid, attendance status Pending, no check_in_attempts row for this call
steps: Invoke PreflightService.validate(tokenId, studentId) for enrolled student with TestClock within attendance window
Assert result outcome Valid with session summary (classCode HESD-01, subjectCode SWE-101, roomName Phòng A201, status Active)
Query qr_tokens for tokenId and assert status remains Valid (not Consumed or Expired)
Query attendance_records for studentId and sessionId and assert status remains Pending
Verify no INSERT or UPDATE executed during preflight per validation-rules §3.6a and API design §6.2
cases.expected: BR-15 preflight read-only chain per validation-rules §3.6a steps 1–6: token exists Valid, optional sessionId matches, parent session Active within attendance window, student enrolled; zero side effects before POST /check-in

cases.title: Preflight chain short-circuits at first failure per validation-rules §3.6a evaluation order
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session and enrolled student
QrToken row with status Consumed (TokenAlreadyUsed scenario)
PreflightService.validate callable with enrolled studentId
steps: Invoke PreflightService.validate(consumedTokenId, enrolledStudentId)
Assert result outcome TokenAlreadyUsed without reaching enrollment check
Query qr_tokens and assert status remains Consumed (read-only)
Query attendance_records and assert no status change
Repeat with unknown tokenId and assert TokenNotFound at step 1 before any session lookup
Repeat with valid token and mismatched optional sessionId query and assert SessionMismatch at step 2 before token status check
cases.expected: BR-15 server-side preflight chain per validation-rules §3.6a: (1) token exists → (2) session mismatch → (3) token status → (4) session Active and attendance window → (5) enrollment; failures are read-only

cases.title: TS-21a: GET preflight 200 Valid for enrolled student on Active session
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student session cookie is set
Active sessionId with Valid unexpired QrToken for class HESD-01 / subject SWE-101
TestClock within attendance window (scheduledStart + 10 min)
steps: Send GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight?sessionId=:sessionId using Student session
Assert HTTP status 200 and response outcome Valid
Assert response session object contains classCode, subjectCode, roomName, status Active
Query qr_tokens for tokenId and assert status remains Valid
Verify no POST /check-in invoked; client may advance to gps_capture per BR-15
cases.expected: AC-07c and TS-21a satisfied: preflight 200 with session summary enables scan → gps_capture transition; BR-15 gate passed

cases.title: TS-21b: GET preflight for expired or unknown token rejects before GPS step
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student session cookie is set
QrToken fixture with status Expired or TestClock at T + 31 seconds after issuedAt
Alternate fixture with non-existent tokenId for TokenNotFound path
steps: Send GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:expiredTokenId/preflight using Student session
Assert HTTP status 403 with outcome ExpiredQr and errorCode ExpiredQr
Assert Vietnamese message Mã QR đã hết hạn, vui lòng quét mã mới
Send GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:unknownTokenId/preflight using Student session
Assert HTTP status 404 with outcome TokenNotFound and errorCode TokenNotFound
Assert Vietnamese message Không nhận diện được mã QR per API design §6.2
Verify qr_tokens and attendance_records unchanged (read-only preflight)
cases.expected: AC-07d and TS-21b satisfied: expired or unknown token preflight fails; client must not enter gps_capture per BR-15

cases.title: TS-21: Not-enrolled student preflight returns NotEnrolled before GPS or Present record
preconditions: Active session for class HESD-01 / subject SWE-101 exists
Authenticated Student B session for user not enrolled in session class-subject pair
Valid unexpired QrToken from GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight using Student B session
Assert HTTP status 403 with outcome NotEnrolled and errorCode NotEnrolled
Assert Vietnamese message Bạn không thuộc danh sách lớp của buổi học này
Query attendance_records for Student B and sessionId and assert status is not Present
Verify no POST /check-in would be reached by client flow after preflight failure
cases.expected: AC-07b and AC-07e satisfied at preflight layer: enrollment guard enforced before gps_capture per BR-15

cases.title: TS-21c: GET preflight with mismatched sessionId query returns SessionMismatch
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student session cookie is set
Valid QrToken bound to sessionId A
Different sessionId B supplied as optional sessionId query param
steps: Send GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight?sessionId=:sessionIdB where tokenId belongs to sessionId A
Assert HTTP status 403 with outcome SessionMismatch and errorCode SessionMismatch
Verify qr_tokens row status unchanged and attendance remains Pending
Assert client must not mount GpsCaptureStep per BR-15 and AC-07f
cases.expected: AC-07f and TS-21c satisfied: deep-link session mismatch rejected at preflight with SessionMismatch; GPS capture never starts

cases.title: GET /check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight returns 200 Valid envelope per API design §6.2
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student session cookie is set
Active session with Valid unexpired QrToken
TestClock within attendance window (scheduledStart + 10 min)
steps: Send GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight?sessionId=:sessionId using Student session
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert Content-Type application/json; charset=utf-8
Assert response body contains outcome Valid, tokenId, sessionId matching request
Assert response body session object contains classCode, subjectCode, roomName, status Active fields
cases.expected: HTTP 200 preflight pass contract per API design §6.2; client authorized to advance from scan to gps_capture

cases.title: GET preflight returns SessionNotActive when session Closed or past attendance window
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student session cookie is set
Fixture A: Valid unexpired QrToken linked to session in Closed state
Fixture B: Active session with TestClock fixed at scheduledStart + 10 minutes + 1 second and Valid unexpired QrToken
steps: Send GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight using Student session against Closed session fixture
Assert HTTP status 403 with outcome SessionNotActive and errorCode SessionNotActive
Send GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight using Student session against Fixture B past attendance window
Assert HTTP status 403 with outcome SessionNotActive and errorCode SessionNotActive
Assert localized Vietnamese message indicates session is not active for check-in
Verify attendance status remains Absent or Pending (not Present) and qr_token status remains Valid (read-only preflight)
cases.expected: BR-15 preflight enforces session Active and within attendance window per validation-rules §3.6a step 4; gps_capture blocked without DB writes

cases.title: GET preflight for Consumed token returns TokenAlreadyUsed without GPS step
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student B session is set
QrToken already Consumed by Student A within 30-second validity window
Student B attempts reuse of same tokenId
steps: Send GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:consumedTokenId/preflight using Student B session
Assert HTTP status 403 with outcome TokenAlreadyUsed and errorCode TokenAlreadyUsed
Assert Vietnamese message Mã QR đã được sử dụng per API design §6.2
Query attendance_records for Student B and assert status is not Present
Assert preflight did not consume or mutate token state; no check_in_attempts or security audit rows written (read-only gate)
Assert client must not mount GpsCaptureStep per BR-15 and AC-07d
cases.expected: BR-11 token reuse rejected at BR-15 preflight layer without GPS step; preflight remains read-only — security log deferred to POST /check-in per BR-11 and AC-09b

cases.title: Unauthenticated GET preflight returns 401 before enrollment or token evaluation
preconditions: No session cookie or expired session
Valid QrToken on Active session exists in database
steps: Send GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight without authentication
Assert HTTP status 401 with outcome Unauthenticated and errorCode Unauthenticated
Verify response body contains no session summary fields (class, subject, room)
Assert BR-15 domain chain did not execute past authentication gate per validation-rules Layer 2
cases.expected: BR-06 blocks preflight at authentication layer; BR-15 enrollment and token checks never run for unauthenticated callers

cases.title: Instructor and TrainingOfficeAdmin denied GET preflight lacking checkin:submit
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor session and TrainingOfficeAdmin session available
Active session with Valid QrToken exists
Only Student role holds checkin:submit per API design §6.2
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight using Instructor session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden with errorCode Forbidden
GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight using TrainingOfficeAdmin session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden with errorCode Forbidden
Verify no attendance or token mutation for either role
cases.expected: BR-15 preflight restricted to Student actor with checkin:submit; non-student roles cannot pass preflight gate

cases.title: Flow A workshop path: preflight 200 precedes POST /check-in in happy-path sequence
preconditions: Admin seeded roster; Instructor created and opened Active session with room GPS
Enrolled Student authenticated; Valid QrToken from GET /api/v1/sessions/:id/qr/current
Student coordinates within gpsRadiusMeters; TestClock within attendance window
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight using Student session and assert HTTP 200 outcome Valid
Assert qr_token status remains Valid after preflight (read-only gate)
POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId and in-radius coordinates using same Student session
Assert HTTP 200 outcome Success and attendance Present
Query qr_tokens and assert status Consumed only after POST (not after preflight)
cases.expected: BR-15 enforced in Flow A critical path per main-workflows §4.3: preflight read-only gate before GPS capture and POST /check-in

cases.title: Preflight 200 advances CheckInFlow to GpsCaptureStep with session summary visible
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student on mobile viewport 375×812
Active session with valid token deep link /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId
VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=true for harness geolocation stub
steps: Navigate to check-in deep link and observe validating_token inline spinner on scan step per ui-states §4.1
Wait for GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight to return HTTP 200 outcome Valid
Verify data-testid gps-capture-step is present in DOM
Verify GPS step header displays class code, subject code, and room name from preflight session summary
Verify QrScannerView is no longer active
cases.expected: AC-07c satisfied: BR-15 preflight pass advances scan → gps_capture with session context; GpsCaptureStep mounts only after HTTP 200

cases.title: gps-capture-step absent until preflight returns HTTP 200 outcome Valid
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student on mobile viewport at /check-in/scan
Valid QrToken decoded from scan but preflight request still in flight (network throttle or pending mock)
Instrument DOM for data-testid gps-capture-step and GPS prompt text Vị trí đã sẵn sàng
steps: Trigger QR scan decode so client initiates GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight
While preflight response pending, assert data-testid gps-capture-step is absent and validating_token spinner visible per ui-states §4.1
Assert no GPS permission prompt, no Vị trí đã sẵn sàng text, no Xác nhận điểm danh submit control
After preflight returns HTTP 200 outcome Valid, assert gps-capture-step mounts
Verify transition scan → gps_capture occurred only on preflight success per BR-15
cases.expected: BR-15 UI gate: GpsCaptureStep must not mount until preflight succeeds; scan → gps_capture blocked during validating_token state

cases.title: Preflight failure keeps user on scan step; GpsCaptureStep never mounts
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student on mobile viewport
Expired or unknown tokenId in deep link /check-in?token=:expiredTokenId&session=:sessionId
steps: Navigate to check-in deep link with expired or unknown token
Verify GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:expiredTokenId/preflight returns ExpiredQr or TokenNotFound
Verify user remains on scan step or ExpiredQr outcome shown inline per CheckInOutcomePanel
Assert data-testid gps-capture-step is absent from DOM
Assert no GPS permission prompt, no Vị trí đã sẵn sàng text, no submit control for GPS step
cases.expected: AC-07d satisfied: BR-15 prevents gps_capture on preflight failure; student prompted to scan fresh QR

cases.title: Deep link skips scan UI only after preflight passes — not on token parse alone
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student on mobile viewport
Deep link /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId with Valid token on Active session
CheckInFlow orchestrator per event-specific-components §2.3
steps: Navigate directly to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId
Assert validating_token preflight spinner visible before any GPS UI per ui-states §4.1
Assert data-testid gps-capture-step absent until GET preflight returns HTTP 200
After preflight 200, verify QrScannerView skipped but GpsCaptureStep mounted with session summary
Repeat navigation with tokenId that fails preflight and verify scan step remains (scanner not skipped)
cases.expected: BR-15 and event-specific-components §2.3: deep link runs same preflight gate; scan UI skipped only after preflight pass, never on token parse alone

cases.title: Preflight read-only chain rejects all failure outcomes per validation-rules §3.6a without writes
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session, enrolled Student A, non-enrolled Student B
Fixtures: unknown tokenId UUID, valid token with mismatched sessionId query param, expired qr_token (>30 s), Consumed qr_token within 30s window
PreflightService evaluates validation-rules §3.6a chain in order without writes
steps: Invoke PreflightService.validate(unknownUuid, studentAId) and assert outcome TokenNotFound
Invoke with valid token and mismatched sessionId query and assert outcome SessionMismatch
Invoke with expired tokenId and assert outcome ExpiredQr
Invoke with consumed tokenId and assert outcome TokenAlreadyUsed
Invoke with valid token and studentBId and assert outcome NotEnrolled
Query attendance_records and qr_tokens and assert no rows modified by any preflight call
cases.expected: BR-15 preflight failure outcomes reject before GPS capture per validation-rules §3.6a; SessionMismatch at step 2, TokenAlreadyUsed at step 3; read-only chain with zero side effects

cases.title: Mobile check-in page shows TokenNotFound for unknown token without mounting GPS step
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student on mobile viewport 375px width
Active session exists; deep link uses random unknown tokenId UUID not in database
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:unknownTokenId&session=:sessionId
Verify GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:unknownTokenId/preflight returns 404 with errorCode TokenNotFound
Verify data-testid gps-capture-step is absent from DOM (no GPS permission prompt)
Verify error panel displays Không nhận diện được mã QR (TokenNotFound outcome)
Verify student remains on scan step or outcome panel without success confirmation
cases.expected: AC-07d satisfied in mobile web UI: unknown token rejected at preflight with TokenNotFound message; GpsCaptureStep never mounts per BR-15

cases.title: Mobile check-in page shows SessionMismatch for mismatched deep-link session without mounting GPS step
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student on mobile viewport 375px width
Active session A with valid QrToken bound to session A
Second session B exists with different sessionId
Deep link uses tokenId from session A but sessionId query param set to session B
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionBId
Verify GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight?sessionId=:sessionBId returns HTTP 403 with errorCode SessionMismatch
Verify data-testid gps-capture-step is absent from DOM (no GPS permission prompt)
Verify error panel displays session-mismatch outcome message
Verify no success confirmation or Present badge shown
Verify qr_tokens row for tokenId remains status Valid (no consumption on preflight failure)
cases.expected: TS-21c and AC-07f satisfied in mobile web UI: session id mismatch rejected at preflight with SessionMismatch; GpsCaptureStep never mounts per BR-15

cases.title: Mobile check-in page shows TokenAlreadyUsed for consumed token without mounting GPS step
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student B on mobile viewport 375px width
QrToken already Consumed by Student A within 30-second validity window
Deep link encodes consumed tokenId and bound sessionId
steps: Student B navigates to /check-in?token=:consumedTokenId&session=:sessionId
Verify GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:consumedTokenId/preflight returns HTTP 403 with errorCode TokenAlreadyUsed
Verify error panel displays Mã QR đã được sử dụng per API design §6.2
Verify data-testid gps-capture-step is absent from DOM (no GPS permission prompt, no Vị trí đã sẵn sàng)
Verify student remains on scan step or outcome panel without Present badge
cases.expected: BR-15 preflight gate rejects consumed token in mobile web UI per validation-rules §3.6a step 3; GPS capture never starts; security log deferred to POST per BR-11
